creator: count@211.ru
text:
Fixed.

In attach.

On Sun, 13 Dec 2009, miwi@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: [maintainer update] net-mgmt/noc: update from 0.3.1 to 0.3.2
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: miwi
> State-Changed-When: Sun Dec 13 11:28:20 UTC 2009
> State-Changed-Why: 
> please sync this patch with the current portstree patch rejected:
> 
> 
> ------------------------ | | | |--- noc-0.3.2.patch begins here ---
> |diff -ruN noc.bak/Makefile noc/Makefile |--- noc.bak/Makefile
> 2009-09-20 01:35:30.000000000 +0700 |+++ noc/Makefile       2009-12-12
> 21:15:00.000000000 +0600 -------------------------- Patching file
> Makefile using Plan A...  Hunk #1 failed at 2.  1 out of 1 hunks
> failed--saving rejects to Makefile.rej Hmm...  The next patch looks like
> a unified diff to me...  The text leading up to this was:
> -------------------------- |diff -ruN noc.bak/distinfo noc/distinfo |---
> noc.bak/distinfo   2009-09-20 01:35:30.000000000 +0700 |+++ noc/distinfo
> 2009-12-12 21:15:06.000000000 +0600 -------------------------- Patching
> file distinfo using Plan A...  Hunk #1 succeeded at 1 with fuzz 2.
> Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...  The text
> leading up to this was: -------------------------- |diff -ruN
> noc.bak/files/noc.sh.in noc/files/noc.sh.in |--- noc.bak/files/noc.sh.in
> 2009-09-20 01:35:30.000000000 +0700 |+++ noc/files/noc.sh.in
> 2009-11-29 01:35:49.000000000 +0600 -------------------------- File to
> patch: files/noc.sh.in Patching file files/noc.sh.in using Plan A...
> Reversed (or previously applied) patch detected!  Assume -R? [y] Hunk #1
> succeeded at 1.  Hunk #2 succeeded at 13.  Hmm...  The next patch looks
> like a unified diff to me...  The text leading up to this was:
> -------------------------- |diff -ruN noc.bak/files/patch-fm_index.html
> noc/files/patch-fm_index.html |--- noc.bak/files/patch-fm_index.html
> 2009-09-1
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=141420
